title: The Green Temptation
writer: Julia Crawford Ivers, Monte M. Katterjohn, Constance Lindsay Skinner
actors: Betty Compson, Mahlon Hamilton, Theodore Kosloff
plot: Genelle and Gaspard operate an itinerant Parisian theatre in which the greatest profits are realized by picking the audience's pockets and robbing their homes while they are watching the show. When the First World War breaks out, ...
